title: OXO Good Grips 2 Cup Glass Measuring Cup
description:
About this item
Spout designed for a dripless pour
Standard and metric measurement markings
Secure, non-slip handle
Microwave-, fridge-, and freezer-safe
Hand wash recommended
reviews_5s: The glass is really thick and sturdy. It adds some weight but feels good. I like it better than their plastic version. I also feel safer when microwaving liquids in it.Just arrived a couple of days ago. Already washed & used & in the dishwasher again. This is a very good measuring cup. The last one I had was plastic & cracked when I put a cup of hot pasta water in it. Prior to that, I've had several glass ones that the measuring markings were rubbed off or not at par. I love the sturdy rubber lid & handle. It is definitetly worth the price.Great measuring cup. I like to use it for eggs in the morning or melting butter or a million other things. Substantial glass makes it bombproof. This one tool has literally changed my whole kitchen experience (well along with a few others). Highly recommend this.I usually love OXO items and this one did not disappoint. I really like the grip on the handle and the cup is a good quality. Another OXO winnerThis measure cup is sturdy, easy to read and seemses accurate in measure. The handle is comfortable to grip. Should another measure cup break it will be replaced by one of these. Love it!!Nice cupAs soon as I took this out of the box, I loved it. I know that might sound weird, but the handle on this measuring cup is so comfortable!! And, of course, it works well in the kitchen too :)Nice having the padded, doesn't get hot, handle. They also changed the pour spout. It seems smaller. If you pour s-l-o-w-l-y, no drips.Just what I needed. I am hoping the lettering stays. I use this often for several things. So we will see. I’ve had the 2cup one for years and some lettering is getting hard to read. Replacing one ever now and then is expected.I have 1 cup, 2 cup and 4 cup Oxo glass measuring cups and they all pour extremely well. This is no small thing, since many glass measuring cups dribble or otherwise pour badly. I have bought and returned several other types over the years, so I'm extremely picky about this issue! I also like the silicone handles for extra grip.
reviews_1s:
Disappointed with this brand. Nice sturdy cup, pours okay and I like the silicone handle. BUT what good is this if there are no markings on the cup? Light use and maybe 6-8 times in the dishwasher in three months and can barely see the markings. Waste of $$.I had a pyrex measuring cup where the letters on the side had faded and could no longer be read, after many years. So I bought this GoodGrips cup to replace it. Clear lettering, good handle, otherwise fine. That was at the end of October.

Here we are, two months later at the end of December, and the lettering is fading and becoming hard to read. Either Cascade dishwasher pods contain some kind of letter-erasing acid, or GoodGrips doesn't know how to make lasting measurement marks on their measuring cups. Either way I need to find a new measuring cup after only two months. Don't buy this if you use a dishwasher.

UPDATE: Oxo replaced the faded measuring cup under warranty in March 2024, after the usual hoops and sending photos to prove the issue and all that. Now, in July, the lettering is fading again, showing that whatever quality control issue Oxo introduced hasn't been addressed yet. Their customer service is replacing it again, here's hoping this one isn't defective too.We do not overuse these,, but, the red marking lines are not readable after only 4 months. ONE STAR!The red measurements washed off in the dishwasher making the item useless-I had to throw it out….Less than a year -all markings are gone. No longer can be used for measuring!!Like many of the other one star reviews for this product the lines have worn off rendering the cup useless. I went back to look at the product description and it says handwashing recommended. Well it should just say not dishwasher safe since the marking wear off in the dishwasher after just 4 months.Only had this for 9 months and I can't read the numbers on it any more. DO NOT WASTE YOUR MONEYYou had one job OXO and you blew it. We washed these measuring cups in the dishwasher ONE TIME and all the numbers have been washed off. We do use citric acid in the dishwasher due to our very hard water but I have old Anchor and Pyrex measuring cups that have been through the dishwasher hundreds of times and the markings are still there. If I could combine the markings of my old cups with the non-dribble pouring of the OXO cups I'd have a great measuring cup. I'd give these cups five stars for pouring but without the markings they are useless.Have had great success with oxo products which is why I purchased their measureing cup..loved the padded handle and simple design but without measurements…. Is it not suitable for a dishwasher? it faded over time.Would've given zero stars if I could. Received this Monday night. Hand washed it and put it away. Tuesday night I used it for the first time and placed in dishwasher. Wednesday (today) this is what it looks like. NO markings left on it at all. It was run through a normal cycle (so not heavy duty wash or anything like that). Hoped these would be a decent replacement for the "new"pyrex that lost all markings after about a year or so, clearly I need to keep searching.
